subject: Re: Toy Store S76C++ (ask 13.5M)
body:
have sarah or you send to sikorsky,. the seat shape is right,, the armrests, and door pull are not.. the magazine holder is cheesy, 

----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net; gmax1@mindspring.com
Sent: Monday, October 30, 2006 5:23:43 PM
Subject: Toy Store S76C++ (ask 13.5M)



I met with Ben today and viewed their S76C++.,,,They did a nice 
job! 

-The divider between cockpit and cabin does not go to the 
ceiling,,,still will be very noisy!

-leather and stitching looks good,,,photos do not complement real 
color leather,,,

the Silver exterior with the tan interior looks 
great.

Ben asked what we paid for our S76,,,I did not tell him,,,he 
guessed 12 million,,,

LV
